title: Method for performing a ran based paging and device supporting the same
abstract: Provided are a method of performing a RAN based paging a device supporting the method. According to one embodiment of the present invention, a method for performing a RAN based paging in a wireless communication system includes: receiving a message, which includes paging related information and information indicating that a user equipment (UE) enters a radio resource control (RRC) inactive state, from a master node (MN); receiving a downlink (DL) data from a core network; and performing the RAN based paging for the UE by using the paging related information.
claims: Claims ( 14 ) A method for performing, by a secondary node (SN) in dual connectivity (DC), a radio access network (RAN) based paging in a wireless communication system, the method comprising: receiving a message, which includes paging related information and information indicating that a user equipment (UE) enters a radio resource control (RRC) inactive state, from a master node (MN); receiving a downlink (DL) data from a core network; and performing the RAN based paging for the UE by using the paging related information. The method of claim 1, wherein the UE is located in a coverage of the SN. The method of claim 1, wherein the paging related information includes at least one of UE identity index value, UE paging identity, paging discontinuous reception (DRX), radio access network (RAN) paging area, paging priority and assistance data for paging. The method of claim 1, wherein a user plane connection between the core network and the SN is maintained, while the UE is in RRC inactive state. The method of claim 1, wherein a control plane connection and a user plane connection between the core network and the MN is maintained, while the UE is in RRC inactive state. The method of claim 1, further comprising: transmitting a notification of the DL data to the MN. The method of claim 1, wherein the paging related information includes a security information for a verification of the UE. The method of claim 7, further comprising: verifying the UE by using the security information, upon receiving the DL data from the core network. The method of claim 1, further comprising: receiving a request for a RRC connection from the UE, when the UE is paged by the paging; configuring radio resource for the RRC connection; and transmitting resume request including information on the configured radio resources to the MN. The method of claim 9, wherein the resume request includes at least one of signaling radio bearer (SRB) identity (ID) or data radio bearer (DRB) ID admitted and rejected by the SN, updated radio link control (RLC) configuration and updated logical channel configuration. The method of claim 9, further comprising: receiving a resume response including information on radio resource configured by the MN based on the resume request; and reconfiguring the radio resource for the RRC connection. The method of claim 11, wherein the resume response includes at least one of SRB ID or DRB ID admitted and rejected by the MN, updated RLC configuration and Updated Logical channel configuration. The method of claim 11, further comprising: resuming radio bearers based on the reconfigured radio resource. A secondary node (SN) in dual connectivity (DC) in a wireless communication system, the SN comprising: a tranceiver for transmitting or receiving a radio signal; and a processor coupled to the transceiver, the processor configured to: receive a message, which includes paging related information and information indicating that a user equipment (UE) enters a radio resource control (RRC) inactive state, from a master node (MN); receive a downlink (DL) data from a core network; and perform a radio access network (RAN) based paging for the UE by using the paging related information.
